meta.dc:title: Same—Citation or notice to appear; procedures after arrest

section.heading: Same—Citation or notice to appear; procedures after arrest

content.p: If any person is arrested for a violation of a provision of this Code, or other ordinance of the city, and such person is not immediately taken before a magistrate as prescribed in the Penal Code of the state, the arresting officer shall prepare in duplicate a written notice to appear in court, containing the name and address of such person, the offense charged, and the time and place where and when such person shall appear in court. After the issuance of the written notice to appear, the arresting officer shall comply with, and the release or nonrelease of the person arrested shall be governed by, the provisions of Section 853.6 of the Penal Code of the state, which Penal Code section is incorporated herein by reference as if fully set forth at this point.
